revision.comment: 「[[Template:Notelist]]」を保護しました: [[Wikipedia:保護の方針#半永久的な保護]]「[[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]」に基づき無期限拡張半保護 ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text: {{reflist|{{Ifempty|{{{1|}}}|{{{colwidth|}}}}}|refs={{Ifempty|{{{refs|}}}|{{{notes|}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}} | 注 | note | upper-alpha | upper-roman | lower-alpha | lower-greek | lower-roman = {{{group|}}} | #default = 注釈 }}}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using notelist with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]. How was this not here before?
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Notelist]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with
make substable
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Notelist]]
make substable
1 revision imported: importing the refn stuff to try to fix the Okinawa article
make substable
make substable
make substable
1 revision imported: importing these templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{safesubst<noinclude />:reflist|{{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}}|refs={{{refs|{{{notes|}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}} | note | upper-alpha | upper-roman | lower-alpha | lower-greek | lower-roman = {{{group|}}} | #default = lower-alpha }}}}{{safesubst<noinclude />:#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using notelist with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Notelist]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | group | notes | refs }}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{safesubst<noinclude />:reflist|{{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}}|refs={{{refs|{{{notes|}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}} | note | upper-alpha | upper-roman | lower-alpha | lower-greek | lower-roman = {{{group|}}} | #default = lower-alpha }}}}{{safesubst<noinclude />:#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using notelist with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Notelist]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | group | notes | refs }}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: revert two substed things: templatestyles in reflist, and probably shouldn't be substing the invoke leaving random categories around potentially either

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
revert two substed things: templatestyles in reflist, and probably shouldn't be substing the invoke leaving random categories around potentially either
1 revision imported: overwriting
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{reflist|{{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}}|refs={{{refs|{{{notes|}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}} | note | upper-alpha | upper-roman | lower-alpha | lower-greek | lower-roman = {{{group|}}} | #default = lower-alpha }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Notelist]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | group | notes | refs }}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages using notelist with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revert two substed things: templatestyles in reflist, and probably shouldn't be substing the invoke leaving random categories around potentially either
